bonuses.leadin: Identify the following about French sculptors, For 10 points each:
parts: Marie-Anne Collot modeled the face of Peter the Great for this 20-foot-tall equestrian statue produced by Etienne-Maurice Falconet; it stands atop the Thunder Stone and is the subject of a Pushkin poem.
